text:
Published

on

By

Blessing Oborodudu failed to clinch a place in the final of the women’s 68kg wrestling, losing to Kyrgyzstan’s Meerim Zhumanazarova, who won the semi-final bout 3-1 on points.

Oborodudu sustained an injury, which affected her performance in the bout. She will now battle for bronze medal on Tuesday.

The 35-year-old won her two previous bouts on Monday against Canadian and French opponents.

She won silver in the same event three years ago in Tokyo.
